member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.ExceptionUtils.ThrowIfNull``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: 如果对象为null则抛出ArgumentNullException

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientUtils
member.summary: HttpClient 工具类，提供根据请求对象构建 MultipartFormDataContent 和根据文件路径获取 ByteArrayContent 的方法，支持异步操作和取消功能。

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientUtils.GetByteArrayContentAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: 根据文件路径异步获取 ByteArrayContent 对象
member.returns: 包含文件内容的 ByteArrayContent 对象

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientUtils.CreateFileContent(System.String,System.Byte[])
member.summary: 创建包含文件数据的 ByteArrayContent 对象，并设置适当的内容类型头
member.param: 文件名，用于确定内容类型
member.returns: 配置好的 ByteArrayContent 对象
member.exception: 当 fileName 或 fileBytes 为 null 或空字符串时抛出

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer
member.summary: 消息脱敏工具

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.TokenPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^(?:[A-Za-z0-9+/]{4})*(?:[A-Za-z0-9+/]{2}==|[A-Za-z0-9+/]{3}=)?$|^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[0-9a-f]{12}$|^[A-Za-z0-9_\\-]{20,}$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Loop greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [+/-9A-Za-z\u212A] exactly 4 times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [+/-9A-Za-z\u212A] exactly 2 times.
○ Match the string "==".
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [+/-9A-Za-z\u212A] exactly 3 times.
○ Match '='.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 8 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a hexadecimal digit exactly 12 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [\-0-9A-Z_a-z\u212A] atomically at least 20 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.SensitiveKeyValuePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
(?i)(token|password|secret|key)\\s*[:=]\\s*['"]?([^'"\\s]{6,})['"]?
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match with 4 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ww].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match a character in the set [Kk\u212A].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [:=].
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'] greedily, optionally.
○ 2nd capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^"'\s] greedily at least 6 times.
○ Match a character in the set ["'] atomically, optionally.

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.PhonePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^1[3-9]\\d{9}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '1'.
○ Match a character in the set [3-9].
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 9 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.EmailPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[^@\\s]+@[^@\\s]+\\.[^@\\s]+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match '@'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] greedily at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [^@\s] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.IdCardPattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\d{17}[\\dXx]$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 17 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Xx\d].
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.Sanitize(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: 脱敏消息内容（改进版）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.SanitizeJsonElement(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.Int32)
member.summary: 递归脱敏JSON元素（优化性能版）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.GetMaskedValue(System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: 根据字段名获取脱敏值

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.IsSensitiveString(System.String)
member.summary: 判断字符串是否为敏感信息（改进版）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.MessageSanitizer.SanitizePlainText(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: 纯文本脱敏（用于非JSON格式）

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator
member.summary: URL 验证工具类，用于防止 SSRF（服务端请求伪造）攻击

member.name: F:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.FeishuDomains
member.summary: 飞书官方域名白名单（只读集合）

member.name: F:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator._privateNetworks
member.summary: 预编译的私有 IP 地址范围（提高检查性能）

member.name: F:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator._dnsCache
member.summary: DNS 解析缓存，减少重复解析（线程安全）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.ValidateUrl(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 验证 URL 是否为飞书官方域名且不包含私有 IP 地址
member.param: 是否允许自定义基础 URL（默认为 false）
member.exception: 当 URL 不在白名单或包含私有 IP 时抛出

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.ValidateBaseUrl(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: 验证基础 URL 配置
member.param: 是否允许自定义基础 URL
member.exception: 当基础 URL 不安全时抛出

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsFeishuDomain(System.String)
member.summary: 检查主机名是否为飞书官方域名

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsPrivateIpAddressAsync(System.String)
member.summary: 异步检查主机名是否为私有 IP 地址

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsPrivateIpAddress(System.String)
member.summary: 检查主机名是否为私有 IP 地址（同步版本，仅供内部使用）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsPrivateIpAddress(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: 检查 IP 地址是否为私有地址

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsInternalDomain(System.String)
member.summary: 检查是否为内网域名（如 .local, .internal, .lan 等）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.IsStandardHttpsPort(System.Uri)
member.summary: 检查是否为标准 HTTPS 端口

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.GetAllowedDomains
member.summary: 获取飞书官方域名白名单

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.AddAllowedDomain(System.String)
member.summary: 添加自定义域名到白名单（运行时扩展）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.UrlValidator.ClearDnsCache
member.summary: 清除 DNS 缓存

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.IPNetwork
member.summary: IP 网络范围辅助类（用于 CIDR 检查）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.IPNetwork.Contains(System.Net.IPAddress)
member.summary: 检查 IP 地址是否在此网络范围内

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.IPNetwork.CreateMask(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 创建网络掩码

member.summary: 将对象序列化为XML字符串

member.returns: XML字符串

member.summary: 从XML字符串反序列化为对象

member.returns: 反序列化后的对象

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClient
member.summary: 增强型HttpClient抽象类，提供了发送HTTP请求和下载文件的基本功能，具体实现由子类完成

member.summary: 初始化增强型HttpClient实例

member.summary: 发送HTTP请求并反序列化JSON响应结果
member.returns: 反序列化后的响应结果

member.summary: 发送HTTP请求并反序列化XML响应结果
member.returns: 反序列化后的响应结果

member.summary: 验证URL的有效性

member.summary: 获取JSON序列化选项（可被子类重写）

member.summary: 获取默认的JSON序列化选项

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs
member.summary: LoggerMessage 委托定义，用于高性能日志记录
member.remarks: 使用 LoggerMessage.Define 创建的委托可以避免： 1. 值类型装箱 2. 不必要的数组分配 3. 在日志级别未启用时的字符串格式化

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.JsonResponseBodyEmpty(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: 记录JSON响应内容为空

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.JsonResponseBodyRaw(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 记录原始JSON响应内容

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.JsonDeserializeSuccess(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 记录JSON反序列化成功

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.XmlResponseBodyEmpty(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: 记录XML响应内容为空

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.XmlResponseBodyRaw(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 记录原始XML响应内容

member.summary: 记录XML反序列化成功

member.summary: 记录HttpClient操作

member.summary: 记录文件已存在将被覆盖

member.summary: 记录读取错误响应失败

member.summary: 记录JSON反序列化失败（简单信息）

member.summary: 记录HTTP请求失败（带状态码）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.HttpRequestFailedSimple(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: 记录HTTP请求失败（简单信息）

member.summary: 记录HTTP请求超时

member.summary: 记录HTTP请求失败（带异常类型）

member.summary: 记录大文件下载失败

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.HttpRequestFailedWithResponse(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: 记录HTTP请求失败（带响应）

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.EnhancedHttpClientLogs.HttpClientError(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: 记录HttpClient错误

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientFactoryEnhancedClient
member.summary: 基于 IHttpClientFactory 的 EnhancedHttpClient 实现
member.remarks:
此类通过 IHttpClientFactory 创建 HttpClient 实例，解决了直接使用 HttpClient 导致的 Socket 耗尽和 DNS 不刷新问题。
注意：IHttpClientFactory 管理 HttpClient 的生命周期，由工厂创建的 HttpClient 实例不应该被手动释放。 如果需要刷新 DNS 或更新 HttpClient 配置，请通过 IHttpClientFactory 的配置重新注册。
推荐在依赖注入场景中使用此类。

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientFactoryEnhancedClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientFactoryEnhancedClient})
member.summary: 初始化 HttpClientFactoryEnhancedClient 实例
member.exception: factory 或 clientName 为 null

member.name: P:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientFactoryEnhancedClient.ClientName
member.summary: 获取当前使用的 HttpClient 名称

member.name: T:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Mud.HttpUtils.Client 服务注册扩展方法。

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMudHttpClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.Action{System.Net.Http.HttpClient})
member.summary: 添加基于 的 到依赖注入容器， 并注册为 服务。
member.param: 配置 HttpClient 的委托（可选）。
member.returns: 服务集合（链式调用）。
member.exception: 参数为 null 时抛出。

member.name: M:Mud.HttpUtils.HttpClientServiceCollectionExtensions.AddMudHttpClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 添加基于 的 到依赖注入容器， 并注册为 服务，同时配置 HttpClient 的基础地址。
member.returns: 服务集合（链式调用）。
member.exception: 参数为 null 时抛出。

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0
member.summary: Custom -derived type for the TokenPattern method.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.Instance
member.summary: Cached, thread-safe singleton instance.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes the instance.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory
member.summary: Provides a factory for creating instances to be used by methods on .

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory.CreateInstance
member.summary: Creates an instance of a used by methods on .

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.TokenPattern_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.PhonePattern_2.RunnerFactory.Runner
member.summary: Provides the runner that contains the custom logic implementing the specified regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.PhonePattern_2.RunnerFactory.Runner.Scan(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Scan the starting from base.runtextstart for the next match.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.PhonePattern_2.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.PhonePattern_2.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_asciiLettersAndDigitsAndDashUnderscoreKelvinSign
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "-0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzK".

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_nonAscii_2BDDE98808630E9B520E3AD9F33E4A0D939EAAED4FF3C3CC86415C934044BB2B
member.summary: Supports searching for characters in or not in "CKSYcksyK".
